message:
fix: replace non-breaking hyphens (U+2011) with standard hyphens

Replace non-breaking hyphen characters (‑, U+2011) with standard ASCII
hyphens (-, U+002D) throughout lib/content.ts. Non-breaking hyphens can
cause JavaScript parsing issues when content is serialized through
React Server Components, potentially causing "Invalid or unexpected
token" errors in production builds.

Affected strings:
- "agent-ready" (SmartEdgar description)
- "Layer-1" (Lumera badge)
- "cross-chain" (Lumera description)
- "best-in-class" (UBS description)
- "vibe-coded", "400-page", "phone-friendly" (Kissinger thesis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
